description: Compute the incubation period in hours for a gastroenteritis outbreak using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Using the 'CaseData' table in the 'StigenOutbreak' project, calculate the time interval between 'MealDateTime' and 'OnsetDateTime' for all confirmed and probable cases (CaseStatus <> 'Not a case'). Analyze the distribution to identify the likely pathogen. Save a results file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\StigenOutbreak\incubation_results.txt including the number of cases analyzed, the median, mean, minimum, and maximum incubation periods, and the name of the likely pathogen.
